sidebar.tutorialSidebar.category.OpenTof.message: In this section, we will configure OpenTofu to work with a Proxmox server, enabling users to provsion and manage their infrastructure using OpenTofu. We will cover the installation of OpenTofu, the configuration of the Proxmox provider, and the creation of a simple OpenTofu configuration file to manage a NixOS virtual machine.

sidebar.tutorialSidebar.category.NixOS.description: The label for category NixOS in sidebar tutorialSidebar

sidebar.tutorialSidebar.category.NixOS.l.message: NixOS is a Linux distribution that uses the Nix package manager to provide a declarative configuration model for system management. It allows users to define their entire system configuration in a single file, making it easy to reproduce and share configurations across different machines. NixOS is known for its reliability, reproducibility, and flexibility, making it a popular choice for developers and system administrators.
